title: deer-flow.research.cycle.started v1
description: Emitted by deer-flow's ResearchDispatchConsumer (packages/harness/deerflow/research_dispatch/consumer.py) immediately after a research cycle subprocess (meta_probe.py) is spawned. Paired with deer-flow.research.cycle.completed.v1. Consumed by hearth to open a live 'cycle' session card. Validated against event['data']. Permissive (additionalProperties:true).

research_id.description: Identifier for the research request (CloudEvents subject).

pid.description: OS process id of the spawned meta_probe.py cycle subprocess.

project_source.description: Originating project/source that requested the cycle.
